title: Protocol Governance
rules: MCP servers in the Tool Registry must pass the Server Addition Checklist (Part 13 Section 2) before use. Servers without trust classification or security review are not approved for production.
MCP server versions must be pinned to exact versions. The tag 'latest' is never acceptable in production configuration.
A2A connections require testing at the level appropriate to the fleet profile (Part 13 Section 5) before deployment. Cross-fleet A2A additionally requires mTLS and OAuth 2.0 authorization.
When adding or removing MCP servers or A2A connections, record the decision in the Brain with rationale, test results, and trust classification.
